AEROM_ALT_ABORT: Maximum allowable loss in altitude during a trick or sequence from its starting altitude.
AEROM_ANG_TC: This is the time over which we filter the desired roll to smooth it
AEROM_DEBUG: This controls the printing of extra debug information on paths
AEROM_ENTRY_RATE: This controls how rapidly we roll into a new orientation
AEROM_ERR_COR_D: This controls how rapidly we correct back onto the desired path
AEROM_ERR_COR_P: This controls how rapidly we correct back onto the desired path
AEROM_KE_RUDD: Percent of rudder normally uses to sustain knife-edge at trick speed
AEROM_KE_RUDD_LK: Time to look ahead in the path to calculate rudder correction for bank angle
AEROM_LKAHD: This is how much time to look ahead in the path for calculating path rates
AEROM_MIS_ANGLE: When set to a non-zero value, this is the assumed direction of the mission. Otherwise the waypoint angle is used
AEROM_OPTIONS:
Options to control aerobatic behavior

位定义:
  位0: UseRTLOnAbort
  位1: AddAtToMessages
  位2: DualAircraftSynchronised
AEROM_PATH_SCALE:
Scale factor for Path/Box size. 0.5 would half the distances in maneuvers. Radii are unaffected.

范围: 0.1 … 100
AEROM_ROL_COR_TC: This is the time constant for correcting roll errors. A smaller value leads to faster roll corrections
AEROM_SPD_I: This controls how rapidly the throttle is raised to compensate for a speed error
AEROM_SPD_P: This controls how rapidly the throttle is raised to compensate for a speed error
AEROM_STALL_PIT: Pitch threashold for moving to final stage of stall turn
AEROM_STALL_THR: Amount of throttle to reduce to for a stall turn
AEROM_THR_BOOST: This is the extra throttle added in schedule elements marked as needing a throttle boost
AEROM_THR_LKAHD: This controls how far ahead we look in time along the path for the target throttle
AEROM_THR_PIT_FF: This controls how much extra throttle to add based on pitch ange. The value is for 90 degrees and is applied in proportion to pitch
AEROM_TIME_COR_P: This is the time constant for correcting path position errors
AEROM_TS_I: This controls how rapidly two aircraft are brought back into time sync
AEROM_TS_P: This controls how rapidly two aircraft are brought back into time sync
AEROM_TS_RATE: This sets the rate we send data for time sync between aircraft
AEROM_TS_SPDMAX: This sets the maximum speed adjustment for time sync between aircraft
AEROM_YAW_ACCEL: This is maximum yaw acceleration to use

DR_FLY_ANGLE:
lean angle (in degrees) during deadreckoning

DR_FLY_TIMEOUT: Copter will attempt to switch to NEXT_MODE after this many seconds of deadreckoning.  If it cannot switch modes it will continue in Guided_NoGPS.  Set to 0 to disable timeout
DR_GPS_SACC_MAX:
GPS speed accuracy maximum, above which deadreckoning home will begin (default is 0.8).  Lower values trigger with good GPS quality, higher values will allow poorer GPS before triggering. Set to 0 to disable use of GPS speed accuracy

范围: 0 … 10
DR_GPS_SAT_MIN:
GPS satellite count threshold below which deadreckoning home will begin (default is 6).  Higher values trigger with good GPS quality, Lower values trigger with worse GPS quality. Set to 0 to disable use of GPS satellite count

范围: 0 … 30
DR_GPS_TRIGG_SEC: GPS checks must fail for this many seconds before dead reckoning will be triggered
DR_NEXT_MODE:
Copter switch to this mode after GPS recovers or DR_FLY_TIMEOUT has elapsed.  Default is 6/RTL.  Set to -1 to return to mode used before deadreckoning was triggered

  16: PosHold
  17: Brake
  2: AltHold

  27: Auto RTL

  4: Guided

LTE_PROTOCOL:
The protocol that we will use in communication with the LTE modem. If this is PPP then the LTE_SERVER parameters are not used and instead a PPP connection will be established and you should use the NET_ parameters to enable network ports. If this is MAVLink2 then the LTE_SERVER parameters are used to create a TCP or UDP connection to a single server.

取值:

This controls how much quicktune is allowed to lower gains from the original gains. If the vehicle already has a reasonable tune and is not oscillating then you can set this to zero to prevent gain reductions. The default of 20% is reasonable for most vehicles. Using a maximum gain reduction lowers the chance of an angle P oscillation happening if quicktune gets a false positive oscillation at a low gain, which can result in very low rate gains and a dangerous angle P oscillation.

SHIP_LAND_ANGLE:
Angle from the stern of the ship for landing approach. Use this to ensure that on a go-around that ship superstructure and cables are avoided. A value of zero means to approach from the rear of the ship. A value of 90 means the landing will approach from the port (left) side of the ship. A value of -90 will mean approaching from the starboard (right) side of the ship. A value of 180 will approach from the bow of the ship. This parameter is combined with the sign of the RTL_RADIUS parameter to determine the holdoff pattern. If RTL_RADIUS is positive then a clockwise loiter is performed, if RTL_RADIUS is negative then a counter-clockwise loiter is used.

ADSB_SQUAWK:
VFR squawk (Mode 3/A) code is a pre-programmed default code when the pilot is flying VFR and not in contact with ATC. In the USA, the VFR squawk code is octal 1200 (hex 0x280, decimal 640) and in most parts of Europe the VFR squawk code is octal 7000. If an invalid octal number is set then it will be reset to 1200.

Type of ADS-B hardware for ADSB-in and ADSB-out configuration and operation. If any type is selected then MAVLink based ADSB-in messages will always be enabled

取值:

  1: uAvionix-MAVLink
  2: Sagetech
  3: uAvionix-UCP
  4: Sagetech MX Series
AFS_AMSL_ERR_GPS: This sets margin for error in GPS derived altitude limit. This error margin is only used if the barometer has failed. If the barometer fails then the GPS will be used to enforce the AMSL_LIMIT, but this margin will be subtracted from the AMSL_LIMIT first, to ensure that even with the given amount of GPS altitude error the pressure altitude is not breached. OBC users should set this to comply with their D2 safety case. A value of -1 will mean that barometer failure will lead to immediate termination.
AFS_AMSL_LIMIT: This sets the AMSL (above mean sea level) altitude limit. If the pressure altitude determined by QNH exceeds this limit then flight termination will be forced. Note that this limit is in meters, whereas pressure altitude limits are often quoted in feet. A value of zero disables the pressure altitude limit.
AFS_DUAL_LOSS: This enables the dual loss termination part of the AFS system. If this parameter is 1 and both GPS and the ground control station fail simultaneously, this will be considered a "dual loss" and cause termination.
AFS_ENABLE: This enables the advanced failsafe system. If this is set to zero (disable) then all the other AFS options have no effect
AFS_GCS_TIMEOUT: The time (in seconds) of persistent data link loss before GCS failsafe occurs.
AFS_GEOFENCE: This enables the geofence part of the AFS. Will only be in effect if AFS_ENABLE is also 1
AFS_HB_PIN:
This sets a digital output pin which is cycled at 10Hz when termination is not activated. Note that if a FS_TERM_PIN is set then the heartbeat pin will continue to cycle at 10Hz when termination is activated, to allow the termination board to distinguish between autopilot crash and termination. Some common values are given, but see the Wiki's "GPIOs" page for how to determine the pin number for a given autopilot.

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled
  113: BB Blue GP0 pin 6
  116: BB Blue GP0 pin 5
  49: BB Blue GP0 pin 4
  50: AUXOUT1
  51: AUXOUT2
  52: AUXOUT3
  53: AUXOUT4
  54: AUXOUT5
  55: AUXOUT6
  57: BB Blue GP0 pin 3
AFS_MAN_PIN: This sets a digital output pin to set high when in manual mode.  See the Wiki's "GPIOs" page for how to determine the pin number for a given autopilot.
AFS_MAX_COM_LOSS: Maximum number of comms loss events before the aircraft stops returning to mission on comms recovery. Use zero to allow for any number of comms loss events.
AFS_MAX_GPS_LOSS: Maximum number of GPS loss events before the aircraft stops returning to mission on GPS recovery. Use zero to allow for any number of GPS loss events.
AFS_MAX_RANGE: This is the maximum range of the vehicle in kilometers from first arming. If the vehicle goes beyond this range then the TERM_ACTION is performed. A value of zero disables this feature.
AFS_OPTIONS:
See description for each bitmask bit description

位定义:
  位0: Continue the mission even after comms are recovered (does not go to the mission item at the time comms were lost)
  位1: Enable AFS for all autonomous modes (not just AUTO)
  位2: Option to not jump to AFS_WP_COMMS if already in the return path
AFS_QNH_PRESSURE: This sets the QNH pressure in millibars to be used for pressure altitude in the altitude limit. A value of zero disables the altitude limit.
AFS_RC: This enables the RC part of the AFS. Will only be in effect if AFS_ENABLE is also 1
AFS_RC_FAIL_TIME: This is the time in seconds in manual mode that failsafe termination will activate if RC input is lost. For the OBC rules this should be (1.5). Use 0 to disable.
AFS_RC_MAN_ONLY: If this parameter is set to 1, then an RC loss will only cause the plane to terminate in manual control modes. If it is 0, then the plane will terminate in any flight mode.
AFS_TERMINATE: Can be set in flight to force termination of the heartbeat signal
AFS_TERM_ACTION: This can be used to force an action on flight termination. Normally this is handled by an external failsafe board, but you can setup ArduPilot to handle it here. Please consult the wiki for more information on the possible values of the parameter
AFS_TERM_PIN:
This sets a digital output pin to set high on flight termination. Some common values are given, but see the Wiki's "GPIOs" page for how to determine the pin number for a given autopilot.

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled
  113: BB Blue GP0 pin 6
  116: BB Blue GP0 pin 5
  49: BB Blue GP0 pin 4
  50: AUXOUT1
  51: AUXOUT2
  52: AUXOUT3
  53: AUXOUT4
  54: AUXOUT5
  55: AUXOUT6
  57: BB Blue GP0 pin 3
AFS_WP_COMMS: Waypoint number to navigate to on comms loss
AFS_WP_GPS_LOSS: Waypoint number to navigate to on GPS lock loss
AHRS_COMP_BETA:
This controls the time constant for the cross-over frequency used to fuse AHRS (airspeed and heading) and GPS data to estimate ground velocity. Time constant is 0.1/beta. A larger time constant will use GPS data less and a small time constant will use air data less.

范围: 0.001 … 0.5
AHRS_CUSTOM_PIT:
Autopilot mounting position pitch offset. Positive values = pitch up, negative values = pitch down. This parameter is only used when AHRS_ORIENTATION is set to CUSTOM.

范围: -180 … 180
AHRS_CUSTOM_ROLL:
Autopilot mounting position roll offset. Positive values = roll right, negative values = roll left. This parameter is only used when AHRS_ORIENTATION is set to CUSTOM.

范围: -180 … 180
AHRS_CUSTOM_YAW:
Autopilot mounting position yaw offset. Positive values = yaw right, negative values = yaw left. This parameter is only used when AHRS_ORIENTATION is set to CUSTOM.

范围: -180 … 180
AHRS_EKF_TYPE:
This controls which NavEKF Kalman filter version is used for attitude and position estimation

取值:
  0: Disabled
  10: Sim
  11: ExternalAHRS
  2: Enable EKF2
  3: Enable EKF3
AHRS_GPS_GAIN:
This controls how much to use the GPS to correct the attitude. This should never be set to zero for a plane as it would result in the plane losing control in turns. For a plane please use the default value of 1.0.

范围: 0.0 … 1.0
AHRS_GPS_MINSATS:
Minimum number of satellites visible to use GPS for velocity based corrections attitude correction. This defaults to 6, which is about the point at which the velocity numbers from a GPS become too unreliable for accurate correction of the accelerometers.

范围: 0 … 10
AHRS_GPS_USE:
This controls whether to use dead-reckoning or GPS based navigation. If set to 0 then the GPS won't be used for navigation, and only dead reckoning will be used. A value of zero should never be used for normal flight. Currently this affects only the DCM-based AHRS: the EKF uses GPS according to its own parameters. A value of 2 means to use GPS for height as well as position - both in DCM estimation and when determining altitude-above-home.

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Use GPS for DCM position
  2: Use GPS for DCM position and height
AHRS_OPTIONS:
This controls optional AHRS behaviour. Setting DisableDCMFallbackFW will change the AHRS behaviour for fixed wing aircraft in fly-forward flight to not fall back to DCM when the EKF stops navigating. Setting DisableDCMFallbackVTOL will change the AHRS behaviour for fixed wing aircraft in non fly-forward (VTOL) flight to not fall back to DCM when the EKF stops navigating. Setting DontDisableAirspeedUsingEKF disables the EKF based innovation check for airspeed consistency. Setting AutoRecordOrigin will auto-save the EKF origin to parameters when it becomes valid.

位定义:
  位0: DisableDCMFallbackFW
  位1: DisableDCMFallbackVTOL
  位2: DontDisableAirspeedUsingEKF
  位3: RecordOrigin
  位4: UseRecordedOriginForNonGPS
AHRS_ORIENTATION:
Overall board orientation relative to the standard orientation for the board type. This rotates the IMU and compass readings to allow the board to be oriented in your vehicle at any 90 or 45 degree angle. The label for each option is specified in the order of rotations for that orientation. This option takes affect on next boot. After changing you will need to re-level your vehicle. Firmware versions 4.2 and prior can use a CUSTOM (100) rotation to set the AHRS_CUSTOM_ROLL/PIT/YAW angles for AHRS orientation. Later versions provide two general custom rotations which can be used, Custom 1 and Custom 2, with CUST_ROT1_ROLL/PIT/YAW or CUST_ROT2_ROLL/PIT/YAW angles.

  9: Yaw45Roll180
AHRS_ORIGIN_ALT:
AHRS last origin altitude in meters

范围: -200 … 5000
AHRS_ORIGIN_LAT:
AHRS last origin latitude in degrees

范围: -180 … 180
AHRS_ORIGIN_LON:
AHRS last origin longitude in degrees

范围: -180 … 180
AHRS_RP_P:
This controls how fast the accelerometers correct the attitude

范围: 0.1 … 0.4
AHRS_TRIM_X:
Compensates for the roll angle difference between the control board and the frame. Positive values make the vehicle roll right.

范围: -0.1745 … +0.1745
AHRS_TRIM_Y:
Compensates for the pitch angle difference between the control board and the frame. Positive values make the vehicle pitch up/back.

范围: -0.1745 … +0.1745
AHRS_WIND_MAX:
This sets the maximum allowable difference between ground speed and airspeed. A value of zero means to use the airspeed as is. This allows the plane to cope with a failing airspeed sensor by clipping it to groundspeed plus/minus this limit. See ARSPD_OPTIONS and ARSPD_WIND_MAX to disable airspeed sensors.

范围: 0 … 127
AHRS_YAW_P:
This controls the weight the compass or GPS has on the heading. A higher value means the heading will track the yaw source (GPS or compass) more rapidly.

范围: 0.1 … 0.4
AIS_LIST_MAX:
AIS list size of nearest vessels. Longer lists take longer to refresh with lower SRx_ADSB values.

范围: 1 … 100
AIS_LOGGING:
Bitmask of AIS logging options

位定义:
  位0: Log all AIVDM messages
  位1: Log only unsupported AIVDM messages
  位2: Log decoded messages
AIS_TIME_OUT:
if no updates are received in this time a vessel will be removed from the list

范围: 1 … 2000
AIS_TYPE:
AIS receiver type

取值:
  0: None
  1: NMEA AIVDM message
ARMING_ACCTHRESH:
Accelerometer error threshold used to determine inconsistent accelerometers. Compares this error range to other accelerometers to detect a hardware or calibration error. Lower value means tighter check and harder to pass arming check. Not all accelerometers are created equal.

范围: 0.25 … 3.0
ARMING_CRSDP_IGN:
Must have value "1" if crashdump data is present on the system, or a prearm failure will be raised.  Do not set this parameter unless the risks of doing so are fully understood.  The presence of a crash dump means that the firmware currently installed has suffered a critical software failure which resulted in the autopilot immediately rebooting.  The crashdump file gives diagnostic information which can help in finding the issue, please contact the ArduPIlot support team.  If this crashdump data is present, the vehicle is likely unsafe to fly.  Check the ArduPilot documentation for more details.

取值:
  0: Crash Dump arming check active
  1: Crash Dump arming check deactivated
ARMING_MAGTHRESH:
Compass magnetic field strength error threshold vs earth magnetic model.  X and y axis are compared using this threhold, Z axis uses 2x this threshold.  0 to disable check

范围: 0 … 500
ARMING_MIS_ITEMS:
Bitmask of mission items that are required to be planned in order to arm the aircraft

位定义:
  位0: Land
  位1: VTOL Land
  位2: DO_LAND_START
  位3: Takeoff
  位4: VTOL Takeoff
  位5: Rallypoint
  位6: RTL
ARMING_NEED_LOC:
Require that the vehicle have an absolute position before it arms.  This can help ensure that the vehicle can Return To Launch.

取值:
  0: Do not require location
  1: Require Location
ARMING_OPTIONS:
Options that can be applied to change arming behaviour

位定义:
  位0: Disable prearm display
  位1: Do not send status text on state change
  位2: Skip IMU consistency checks when ICE motor running
ARMING_RUDDER:
Allow arm/disarm by rudder input. When enabled arming can be done with right rudder, disarming with left rudder. Rudder arming only works with throttle at zero +- deadzone (RCx_DZ). Depending on vehicle type, arming in certain modes is prevented. See the wiki for each vehicle. Caution is recommended when arming if it is allowed in an auto-throttle mode!

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: ArmingOnly
  2: ArmOrDisarm
ARMING_SKIPCHK:
Checks to skip prior to arming motor. This is a bitmask of checks before allowing arming that will be skipped. For most users it is recommended to leave this at the default of 0 (no checks skipped). In extreme circumstances, a value of -1 can be used to skip all non-mandatory current and future checks.

位定义:
  位1: Barometer
  位2: Compass
  位3: GPS lock
  位4: INS
  位5: Parameters
  位6: RC Channels
  位7: Board voltage
  位8: Battery Level
  位10: Logging Available
  位11: Hardware safety switch
  位12: GPS Configuration
  位13: System
  位14: Mission
  位15: Rangefinder
  位16: Camera
  位17: AuxAuth
  位18: VisualOdometry
  位19: FFT
AROT_COL_FILT_E:
Cut-off frequency for collective low pass filter. For the entry phase. Acts as a following trim.  Must be higher than AROT_COL_FILT_G.

范围: 0.2 … 0.5
AROT_COL_FILT_G:
Cut-off frequency for collective low pass filter. For the glide phase. Acts as a following trim.  Must be lower than AROT_COL_FILT_E.

范围: 0.03 … 0.15
AROT_ENABLE:
Allows you to enable (1) or disable (0) the autonomous autorotation capability.

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled
AROT_FWD_D:
Provides damping to velocity controller.

范围: 0.00 … 1.00
AROT_FWD_FF:
Produces an output that is proportional to the magnitude of the target.

范围: 0 … 1
AROT_FWD_FLTD:
This filter low pass filter is applied to the input for D terms.

范围: 0 … 100
AROT_FWD_FLTE:
This filter low pass filter is applied to the input for P and I terms.

范围: 0 … 100
AROT_FWD_I:
Corrects long-term difference in desired velocity to a target acceleration.

范围: 0.02 … 1.00
AROT_FWD_IMAX:
Constrains the target acceleration that the I gain will output.

范围: 1.000 … 8.000
AROT_FWD_P:
Converts the difference between desired forward speed and actual speed into an acceleration target that is passed to the pitch angle controller.

范围: 1.000 … 8.000
AROT_FWD_SP_TARG:
Target ground speed in cm/s for the autorotation controller to try and achieve/ maintain during the glide phase.

范围: 8 … 20
AROT_HS_P:
Increase value to increase sensitivity of head speed controller during autonomous autorotation.

范围: 0.3 … 1
AROT_HS_SENSOR:
Allocate the RPM sensor instance to use for measuring head speed. RPM1 = 0.  RPM2 = 1.

范围: 0.5 … 3
AROT_HS_SET_PT:
The target head speed in RPM during autorotation. Start by setting to desired hover speed and tune from there as necessary.

范围: 1000 … 2800
AROT_XY_ACC_MAX:
Maximum body frame acceleration allowed in the in speed controller. This limit defines a circular constraint in accel. Minimum used is 0.5 m/s/s.

范围: 0.5 … 8.0
ARSPD_ENABLE:
Enable airspeed sensor support

取值:
  0: Disable
  1: Enable
ARSPD_OPTIONS:
Bitmask of options to use with airspeed. 0:Disable use based on airspeed/groundspeed mismatch (see ARSPD_WIND_MAX), 1:Automatically reenable use based on airspeed/groundspeed mismatch recovery (see ARSPD_WIND_MAX) 2:Disable voltage correction, 3:Check that the airspeed is statistically consistent with the navigation EKF vehicle and wind velocity estimates using EKF3 (requires AHRS_EKF_TYPE = 3), 4:Report cal offset to GCS

位定义:
  位0: SpeedMismatchDisable
  位1: AllowSpeedMismatchRecovery
  位2: DisableVoltageCorrection
  位3: UseEkf3Consistency
  位4: ReportOffset
ARSPD_PRIMARY:
This selects which airspeed sensor will be the primary if multiple sensors are found

取值:
  0: FirstSensor
  1: 2nd Sensor
  2: 3rd Sensor
  3: 4th Sensor
  4: 5th Sensor
  5: 6th Sensor
ARSPD_TUBE_ORDER:
This parameter allows you to control whether the order in which the tubes are attached to your pitot tube matters. If you set this to 0 then the first (often the top) connector on the sensor needs to be the stagnation pressure (the pressure at the tip of the pitot tube). If set to 1 then the second (often the bottom) connector needs to be the stagnation pressure. If set to 2 (the default) then the airspeed driver will accept either order. The reason you may wish to specify the order is it will allow your airspeed sensor to detect if the aircraft is receiving excessive pressure on the static port compared to the stagnation port such as during a stall, which would otherwise be seen as a positive airspeed.

取值:
  0: Normal
  1: Swapped
  2: Auto Detect
ARSPD_WIND_GATE:
Number of standard deviations applied to the re-enable EKF consistency check that is used when ARSPD_OPTIONS bit position 3 is set. Larger values will make the re-enabling of the airspeed sensor faster, but increase the likelihood of re-enabling a degraded sensor. The value can be tuned by using the ARSP.TR log message by setting ARSPD_WIND_GATE to a value that is higher than the value for ARSP.TR observed with a healthy airspeed sensor. Occasional transients in ARSP.TR above the value set by ARSPD_WIND_GATE can be tolerated provided they are less than 5 seconds in duration and less than 10% duty cycle.

范围: 0.0 … 10.0
ARSPD_WIND_MAX: If the difference between airspeed and ground speed is greater than this value the sensor will be marked unhealthy. Using ARSPD_OPTIONS this health value can be used to disable the sensor.
ARSPD_WIND_WARN: If the difference between airspeed and GPS speed is greater than this value the sensor will issue a warning. If 0 ARSPD_WIND_MAX is used.
ARSPD2_AUTOCAL: Enables automatic adjustment of airspeed ratio during a calibration flight based on estimation of ground speed and true airspeed. New ratio saved every 2 minutes if change is > 5%. Should not be left enabled.
ARSPD2_BUS:
Bus number of the I2C bus where the airspeed sensor is connected. May not correspond to board's I2C bus number labels. Retry another bus and reboot if airspeed sensor fails to initialize.

取值:
  0: Bus0
  1: Bus1
  2: Bus2
  3: Bus3
ARSPD2_DEVID: Airspeed sensor ID, taking into account its type, bus and instance
ARSPD2_PIN:
The pin number that the airspeed sensor is connected to for analog sensors. Values for some autopilots are given as examples. Search wiki for "Analog pins".

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled
  100: PX4-v1
  13: Pixhawk2_PM2/CubeOrange_PM2
  14: CubeOrange
  16: Durandal
  2: Pixhawk/Pixracer/Navio2/Pixhawk2_PM1
  5: Navigator
ARSPD2_PSI_RANGE: This parameter allows you to set the PSI (pounds per square inch) range for your sensor. You should not change this unless you examine the datasheet for your device
ARSPD2_RATIO: Calibrates pitot tube pressure to velocity. Increasing this value will indicate a higher airspeed at any given dynamic pressure.
ARSPD2_SKIP_CAL:
This parameter allows you to skip airspeed offset calibration on startup, instead using the offset from the last calibration or requiring a manual calibration. This may be desirable if the offset variance between flights for your sensor is low and you want to avoid having to cover the pitot tube on each boot.

取值:
  0: Disable
  1: Do not require offset calibration before flight. Manual calibration should be performed during initial setup.
  2: Do not calibrate on start up. Manual calibration must be performed once per boot.
ARSPD2_TUBE_ORDR:
This parameter allows you to control whether the order in which the tubes are attached to your pitot tube matters. If you set this to 0 then the first (often the top) connector on the sensor needs to be the stagnation pressure (the pressure at the tip of the pitot tube). If set to 1 then the second (often the bottom) connector needs to be the stagnation pressure. If set to 2 (the default) then the airspeed driver will accept either order. The reason you may wish to specify the order is it will allow your airspeed sensor to detect if the aircraft is receiving excessive pressure on the static port compared to the stagnation port such as during a stall, which would otherwise be seen as a positive airspeed.

取值:
  0: Normal
  1: Swapped
  2: Auto Detect

  9: I2C-DLVR-10in
ARSPD2_USE:
Enables airspeed use for automatic throttle modes and replaces control from THR_TRIM. Continues to display and log airspeed if set to 0. Uses airspeed for control if set to 1. Only uses airspeed when throttle = 0 if set to 2 (useful for gliders with airspeed sensors behind propellers).

取值:

  1: Use
  2: UseWhenZeroThrottle

The reason you may wish to specify the order is it will allow your airspeed sensor to detect if the aircraft is receiving excessive pressure on the static port compared to the stagnation port such as during a stall, which would otherwise be seen as a positive airspeed.

取值:
  0: Normal
  1: Swapped
  2: Auto Detect

ARSPD4_USE:
Enables airspeed use for automatic throttle modes and replaces control from THR_TRIM. Continues to display and log airspeed if set to 0. Uses airspeed for control if set to 1. Only uses airspeed when throttle = 0 if set to 2 (useful for gliders with airspeed sensors behind propellers).

取值:
  0: DoNotUse
  1: Use
  2: UseWhenZeroThrottle

  1: Bus1
  2: Bus2
  3: Bus3

ARSPD5_RATIO: Calibrates pitot tube pressure to velocity. Increasing this value will indicate a higher airspeed at any given dynamic pressure.
ARSPD5_SKIP_CAL:
This parameter allows you to skip airspeed offset calibration on startup, instead using the offset from the last calibration or requiring a manual calibration. This may be desirable if the offset variance between flights for your sensor is low and you want to avoid having to cover the pitot tube on each boot.

The reason you may wish to specify the order is it will allow your airspeed sensor to detect if the aircraft is receiving excessive pressure on the static port compared to the stagnation port such as during a stall, which would otherwise be seen as a positive airspeed.

ATC_RAT_PIT_SMAX:
Sets an upper limit on the slew rate produced by the combined P and D gains. If the amplitude of the control action produced by the rate feedback exceeds this value, then the D+P gain is reduced to respect the limit. This limits the amplitude of high frequency oscillations caused by an excessive gain. The limit should be set to no more than 25% of the actuators maximum slew rate to allow for load effects. Note: The gain will not be reduced to less than 10% of the nominal value. A value of zero will disable this feature.

maximum angular acceleration in deg/s/s allowed during autotune maneuvers

范围: 1 … 4000
AUTOTUNE_AGGR:
Autotune aggressiveness. Defines the bounce back used to detect size of the D term.

1-byte bitmap of axes to autotune

位定义:
  位0: Roll
  位1: Pitch
  位2: Yaw
AUTOTUNE_FRQ_MAX:
Defines the end frequency for sweeps and dwells

范围: 50 … 120
AUTOTUNE_FRQ_MIN:
Defines the start frequency for sweeps and dwells

范围: 10 … 30
AUTOTUNE_GMBK:
Fraction by which tuned P and D gains are reduced after rate and angle AutoTune steps complete. This provides extra stability margin by reducing gains slightly from the optimal values found during tuning. A value of 0.0 applies no reduction. A value of 0.25 reduces tuned gains by 25%.

范围: 0.0 … 0.5
AUTOTUNE_GN_MAX:
Defines the response gain (output/input) to tune

范围: 1 … 2.5
AUTOTUNE_MIN_D:
Defines the minimum D gain

范围: 0.0001 … 0.005
AUTOTUNE_RAT_MAX:
maximum angular rate in deg/s allowed during autotune maneuvers

范围: 0 … 500
AUTOTUNE_SEQ:
2-byte bitmask to select what tuning should be performed.  Max gain automatically performed if Rate D is selected. Values: 7:All,1:VFF Only,2:Rate D/Rate P Only(incl max gain),4:Angle P Only,8:Max Gain Only,16:Tune Check,3:VFF and Rate D/Rate P(incl max gain),5:VFF and Angle P,6:Rate D/Rate P(incl max gain) and angle P

位定义:
  位0: VFF
  位1: Rate D/Rate P(incl max gain)
  位2: Angle P
  位3: Max Gain Only
  位4: Tune Check
AUTOTUNE_VELXY_P:
Velocity xy P gain used to hold position during Max Gain, Rate P, and Rate D frequency sweeps

范围: 0 … 1
AVD_ENABLE:
Enable Avoidance using ADSB

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled
AVD_F_ACTION:
Specifies aircraft behaviour when a collision is imminent

取值:
  0: None
  1: Report
  2: Climb Or Descend
  3: Move Horizontally
  4: Move Perpendicularly in 3D
  5: RTL
  6: Hover
AVD_F_ALT_MIN: Minimum AMSL (above mean sea level) altitude for ADS-B avoidance. If the vehicle is below this altitude, no avoidance action will take place. Useful to prevent ADS-B avoidance from activating while below the tree line or around structures. Default of 0 is no minimum.
AVD_F_DIST_XY: Closest allowed projected distance before F_ACTION is undertaken
AVD_F_DIST_Z: Closest allowed projected distance before BEHAVIOUR_F is undertaken
AVD_F_RCVRY:
Determines what the aircraft will do after a fail event is resolved

取值:
  0: Remain in AVOID_ADSB
  1: Resume previous flight mode
  2: RTL
  3: Resume if AUTO else Loiter
AVD_F_TIME: Aircraft velocity vectors are multiplied by this time to determine closest approach.  If this results in an approach closer than F_DIST_XY or F_DIST_Z then F_ACTION is undertaken
AVD_OBS_MAX: Maximum number of obstacles to track
AVD_W_ACTION:
Specifies aircraft behaviour when a collision may occur

取值:
  0: None
  1: Report
AVD_W_DIST_XY: Closest allowed projected distance before W_ACTION is undertaken
AVD_W_DIST_Z: Closest allowed projected distance before BEHAVIOUR_W is undertaken
AVD_W_TIME: Aircraft velocity vectors are multiplied by this time to determine closest approach.  If this results in an approach closer than W_DIST_XY or W_DIST_Z then W_ACTION is undertaken (assuming F_ACTION is not undertaken)
AVOID_ACCEL_MAX:
Maximum acceleration with which obstacles will be avoided with. Set zero to disable acceleration limits

范围: 0 … 9
AVOID_ALT_MIN:
Minimum altitude above which proximity based avoidance will start working. This requires a valid downward facing rangefinder reading to work. Set zero to disable

范围: 0 … 6
AVOID_ANG_MAX:
Max lean angle used to avoid obstacles while in non-GPS modes.  Set to zero to disable lean-based avoidance

范围: 0 … 45
AVOID_BACKUP_DZ:
Distance beyond AVOID_MARGIN parameter, after which vehicle will backaway from obstacles. Increase this parameter if you see vehicle going back and forth in front of obstacle.

范围: 0 … 2
AVOID_BACKUP_SPD:
Maximum speed that will be used to back away from obstacles horizontally in position control modes (m/s). Set zero to disable horizontal backup.

范围: 0 … 2
AVOID_BACKZ_SPD:
Maximum speed that will be used to back away from obstacles vertically in height control modes (m/s). Set zero to disable vertical backup.

范围: 0 … 2
AVOID_BEHAVE:
Avoidance behaviour (slide or stop)

取值:
  0: Slide
  1: Stop
AVOID_DIST_MAX:
Distance from object at which obstacle avoidance will begin in non-GPS modes

范围: 1 … 30
AVOID_ENABLE:
Enabled/disable avoidance input sources

位定义:
  位0: UseFence
  位1: UseProximitySensor
  位2: UseBeaconFence
AVOID_MARGIN:
Vehicle will attempt to stay at least this distance (in meters) from objects while in GPS modes

范围: 1 … 10
BARO1_DEVID: Barometer sensor ID, taking into account its type, bus and instance
BARO1_THST_SCALE:
Thrust scaling in Pascals. This value scaled by the normalized thrust is subtracted from the barometer pressure. This is used to adjust linearly based on the thrust output for local pressure difference induced by the props.

范围: -300 … 300
BARO2_DEVID: Barometer2 sensor ID, taking into account its type, bus and instance
BARO3_DEVID: Barometer3 sensor ID, taking into account its type, bus and instance
BARO_ALTERR_MAX:
This is the maximum acceptable altitude discrepancy between GPS altitude and barometric presssure altitude calculated against a standard atmosphere for arming checks to pass. If you are getting an arming error due to this parameter then you may have a faulty or substituted barometer. A common issue is vendors replacing a MS5611 in a "Pixhawk" with a MS5607. If you have that issue then please see BARO_OPTIONS parameter to force the MS5611 to be treated as a MS5607. This check is disabled if the value is zero.

范围: 0 … 5000
BARO_ALT_OFFSET: altitude offset in meters added to barometric altitude. This is used to allow for automatic adjustment of the base barometric altitude by a ground station equipped with a barometer. The value is added to the barometric altitude read by the aircraft. It is automatically reset to 0 when the barometer is calibrated on each reboot or when a preflight calibration is performed.
BARO_EXT_BUS:
This selects the bus number for looking for an I2C barometer. When set to -1 it will probe all external i2c buses based on the BARO_PROBE_EXT parameter.

取值:
  -1: Disabled
  0: Bus0
  1: Bus1
  6: Bus6
BARO_FIELD_ELV: User provided field elevation in meters. This is used to improve the calculation of the altitude the vehicle is at. This parameter is not persistent and will be reset to 0 every time the vehicle is rebooted. Changes to this parameter will only be used when disarmed. A value of 0 means the EKF origin height is used for takeoff height above sea level.
BARO_FLTR_RNG:
This sets the range around the average value that new samples must be within to be accepted. This can help reduce the impact of noise on sensors that are on long I2C cables. The value is a percentage from the average value. A value of zero disables this filter.

范围: 0 … 100
BARO_GND_TEMP: User provided ambient ground temperature in degrees Celsius. This is used to improve the calculation of the altitude the vehicle is at. This parameter is not persistent and will be reset to 0 every time the vehicle is rebooted. A value of 0 means use the internal measurement ambient temperature.
BARO_OPTIONS:
Barometer options

位定义:
  位0: Treat MS5611 as MS5607
BARO_PRIMARY:
This selects which barometer will be the primary if multiple barometers are found

取值:
  0: FirstBaro
  1: 2ndBaro
  2: 3rdBaro
BARO_PROBE_EXT:
This sets which types of external i2c barometer to look for. It is a bitmask of barometer types. The I2C buses to probe is based on BARO_EXT_BUS. If BARO_EXT_BUS is -1 then it will probe all external buses, otherwise it will probe just the bus number given in BARO_EXT_BUS.

位定义:
  位0: BMP085
  位1: BMP280
  位2: MS5611
  位3: MS5607
  位4: MS5637
  位5: FBM320
  位6: DPS280
  位7: LPS25H
  位8: Keller
  位9: MS5837
  位10: BMP388
  位11: SPL06
  位12: MSP
  位13: BMP581
  位14: AUAV
BARO_THST_FILT:
Low-pass filter cutoff frequency for thrust compensation. This smooths the throttle input to prevent rapid baro altitude changes during throttle transients. Set to 0 to disable filtering.

范围: 0 … 10
BARO1_WCF_BCK:
This is the ratio of static pressure error to dynamic pressure generated by a negative wind relative velocity along the X body axis. If the baro height estimate rises during backwards flight, then this will be a negative number. Multirotors can use this feature only if using EKF3 and if the EK3_DRAG_BCOEF_X and EK3_DRAG_BCOEF_Y parameters have been tuned.

范围: -1.0 … 1.0
BARO1_WCF_DN:
This is the ratio of static pressure error to dynamic pressure generated by a negative wind relative velocity along the Z body axis. If the baro height estimate rises above truth height during descending flight (or forward flight with a high backwards lean angle, eg braking manoeuvre), then this should be a negative number. Multirotors can use this feature only if using EKF3 and if the EK3_DRAG_BCOEF_X and EK3_DRAG_BCOEF_Y parameters have been tuned.

范围: -1.0 … 1.0
BARO1_WCF_ENABLE:
This enables the use of wind coefficients for barometer compensation

取值:
  0: Disabled
  1: Enabled
BARO1_WCF_FWD:
This is the ratio of static pressure error to dynamic pressure generated by a positive wind relative velocity along the X body axis. If the baro height estimate rises during forwards flight, then this will be a negative number. Multirotors can use this feature only if using EKF3 and if the EK3_DRAG_BCOEF_X and EK3_DRAG_BCOEF_Y parameters have been tuned.

范围: -1.0 … 1.0
BARO1_WCF_LFT:
This is the ratio of static pressure error to dynamic pressure generated by a negative wind relative velocity along the Y body axis. If the baro height estimate rises during sideways flight to the left, then this should be a negative number. Multirotors can use this feature only if using EKF3 and if the EK3_DRAG_BCOEF_X and EK3_DRAG_BCOEF_Y parameters have been tuned.

范围: -1.0 … 1.0
BARO1_WCF_RGT:
This is the ratio of static pressure error to dynamic pressure generated by a positive wind relative velocity along the Y body axis. If the baro height estimate rises during sideways flight to the right, then this should be a negative number. Multirotors can use this feature only if using EKF3 and if the EK3_DRAG_BCOEF_X and EK3_DRAG_BCOEF_Y parameters have been tuned.

范围: -1.0 … 1.0
BARO1_WCF_UP:
This is the ratio of static pressure error to dynamic pressure generated by a positive wind relative velocity along the Z body axis. If the baro height estimate rises above truth height during climbing flight (or forward flight with a high forwards lean angle), then this should be a negative number. Multirotors can use this feature only if using EKF3 and if the EK3_DRAG_BCOEF_X and EK3_DRAG_BCOEF_Y parameters have been tuned.

BATT2_AMP_OFFSET: Voltage offset at zero current on current sensor
BATT2_AMP_PERVLT: Number of amps that a 1V reading on the current sensor corresponds to.
BATT2_ARM_MAH: Battery capacity remaining which is required to arm the aircraft. Set to 0 to allow arming at any capacity. Note that execept for smart batteries rebooting the vehicle will always reset the remaining capacity estimate, which can lead to this check not providing sufficent protection, it is recommended to always use this in conjunction with the BATT2_ARM_VOLT parameter.
BATT2_ARM_VOLT: Battery voltage level which is required to arm the aircraft. Set to 0 to allow arming at any voltage.
BATT2_CAPACITY: Capacity of the battery in mAh when full
BATT2_CHANNEL:
INA3221 channel to return data for

范围: 1 … 3
BATT2_CRT_MAH: Battery capacity at which the critical battery failsafe is triggered. Set to 0 to disable battery remaining failsafe. If the battery capacity drops below this level the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATT2_FS_CRT_ACT parameter.
BATT2_CRT_VOLT: Battery voltage that triggers a critical battery failsafe. Set to 0 to disable. If the battery voltage drops below this voltage continuously for more then the period specified by the BATT2_LOW_TIMER parameter then the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATT2_FS_CRT_ACT parameter.
BATT2_CURR_MULT:
Multiplier applied to all current related reports to allow for adjustment if no UAVCAN param access or current splitting applications

范围: 0.1 … 10
BATT2_CURR_PIN:
Sets the analog input pin that should be used for Current monitoring on AD7091R5.

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled
BATT2_ESC_INDEX:
ESC Telemetry Index to write voltage, current, consumption and temperature data to. Use 0 to disable.

范围: 0 … 10
BATT2_ESC_MASK:
If 0 all connected ESCs will be used. If non-zero, only those selected in will be used.

位定义:
  位0: ESC 1
  位1: ESC 2
  位2: ESC 3
  位3: ESC 4
  位4: ESC 5
  位5: ESC 6
  位6: ESC 7
  位7: ESC 8
  位8: ESC 9
  位9: ESC 10
  位10: ESC 11
  位11: ESC 12
  位12: ESC 13
  位13: ESC 14
  位14: ESC 15
  位15: ESC 16
  位16: ESC 17
  位17: ESC 18
  位18: ESC 19
  位19: ESC 20
  位20: ESC 21

  位22: ESC 23

  位24: ESC 25
  位25: ESC 26
  位26: ESC 27
  位27: ESC 28
  位28: ESC 29
  位29: ESC 30
  位30: ESC 31
  位31: ESC 32
BATT2_FL_FF:
First order polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10
BATT2_FL_FLTR:
Filter frequency in Hertz where a low pass filter is used. This is used to filter out tank slosh from the fuel level reading. A value of -1 disables the filter and unfiltered voltage is used to determine the fuel level. The suggested values at in the range of 0.2 Hz to 0.5 Hz.

范围: -1 … 1
BATT2_FL_FS:
Second order polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10
BATT2_FL_FT:
Third order polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10
BATT2_FL_OFF:
Offset polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10
BATT2_FL_PIN:
Analog input pin that fuel level sensor is connected to.Analog Airspeed or RSSI ports can be used for Analog input( some autopilots provide others also). Values for some autopilots are given as examples. Search wiki for "Analog pins".

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled
  100: PX4-v1
  13: Pixhawk2_PM2/CubeOrange_PM2
  14: CubeOrange
  16: Durandal
  2: Pixhawk/Pixracer/Navio2/Pixhawk2_PM1
  5: Navigator
BATT2_FL_VLT_MIN:
The voltage seen on the analog pin when the fuel tank is empty. Note: For this type of battery monitor, the voltage seen by the analog pin is displayed as battery voltage on a GCS.

范围: 0.01 … 10
BATT2_FL_V_MULT:
Voltage multiplier to determine what the full tank voltage reading is. This is calculated as 1 / (Voltage_Full - Voltage_Empty) Note: For this type of battery monitor, the voltage seen by the analog pin is displayed as battery voltage on a GCS.

范围: 0.01 … 10
BATT2_FS_CRT_ACT:
What action the vehicle should perform if it hits a critical battery failsafe

取值:
  0: Warn only
  1: Land
  2: RTL
  3: SmartRTL or RTL
  4: SmartRTL or Land
  5: Terminate
  6: Auto DO_LAND_START/DO_RETURN_PATH_START or RTL
  7: Brake or Land
BATT2_FS_LOW_ACT:
What action the vehicle should perform if it hits a low battery failsafe

取值:
  0: Warn only
  1: Land
  2: RTL
  3: SmartRTL or RTL
  4: SmartRTL or Land
  5: Terminate
  6: Auto DO_LAND_START/DO_RETURN_PATH_START or RTL
  7: Brake or Land
BATT2_FS_VOLTSRC:
Voltage type used for detection of low voltage event

取值:
  0: Raw Voltage
  1: Sag Compensated Voltage
BATT2_I2C_ADDR:
Battery monitor I2C address. If this is zero then probe list of supported addresses

范围: 0 … 127
BATT2_I2C_BUS:
Battery monitor I2C bus number

范围: 0 … 3
BATT2_LOW_MAH: Battery capacity at which the low battery failsafe is triggered. Set to 0 to disable battery remaining failsafe. If the battery capacity drops below this level the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATT2_FS_LOW_ACT parameter.
BATT2_LOW_TIMER:
This is the timeout in seconds before a low voltage event will be triggered. For aircraft with low C batteries it may be necessary to raise this in order to cope with low voltage on long takeoffs. A value of zero disables low voltage errors.

范围: 0 … 120
BATT2_LOW_VOLT: Battery voltage that triggers a low battery failsafe. Set to 0 to disable. If the battery voltage drops below this voltage continuously for more then the period specified by the BATT2_LOW_TIMER parameter then the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATT2_FS_LOW_ACT parameter.
BATT2_MAX_AMPS:
This controls the maximum current the INA239 sensor will work with.

范围: 1 … 400
BATT2_MAX_VOLT:
Maximum voltage of battery. Provides scaling of current versus voltage

范围: 7 … 100
BATT2_MONITOR:
Controls enabling monitoring of the battery's voltage and current

取值:
  0: Disabled
  10: Sum Of Selected Monitors
  11: FuelFlow
  12: FuelLevelPWM
  13: SMBUS-SUI3
  14: SMBUS-SUI6
  15: NeoDesign
  16: SMBus-Maxell
  17: Generator-Elec
  18: Generator-Fuel
  19: Rotoye
  20: MPPT
  21: INA2XX (INA226 INA228 INA238 INA231 INA260)
  22: LTC2946
  23: Torqeedo
  24: FuelLevelAnalog
  25: Synthetic Current and Analog Voltage
  26: INA239_SPI
  27: EFI
  28: AD7091R5
  29: Scripting
  3: Analog Voltage Only
  30: INA3221
  31: Analog Current Only
  32: TIBQ76952-I2C (Periph only)
  4: Analog Voltage and Current
  5: Solo
  6: Bebop
  7: SMBus-Generic
  8: DroneCAN-BatteryInfo
  9: ESC
BATT2_OPTIONS:
This sets options to change the behaviour of the battery monitor

位定义:
  位0: Ignore DroneCAN SoC
  位1: MPPT reports input voltage and current
  位2: MPPT Powered off when disarmed
  位3: MPPT Powered on when armed
  位4: MPPT Powered off at boot
  位5: MPPT Powered on at boot
  位6: Send resistance compensated voltage to GCS
  位7: Allow DroneCAN InfoAux to be from a different CAN node
  位8: Battery is for internal autopilot use only
  位9: Sum monitor measures minimum voltage instead of average
  位10: Allow DroneCAN dynamic node update on hot-swap
BATT2_SERIAL_NUM: Battery serial number, automatically filled in for SMBus batteries, otherwise will be -1. With DroneCan it is the battery_id.
BATT2_SHUNT:
This sets the shunt resistor used in the device

范围: 0.0001 … 0.01
BATT2_SUM_MASK:
0: sum of remaining battery monitors, If none 0 sum of specified monitors. Current will be summed and voltages averaged.

位定义:
  位0: monitor 1
  位1: monitor 2
  位2: monitor 3
  位3: monitor 4
  位4: monitor 5
  位5: monitor 6
  位6: monitor 7
  位7: monitor 8
  位8: monitor 9
BATT2_VLT_OFFSET: Voltage offset on voltage pin. This allows for an offset due to a diode. This voltage is subtracted before the scaling is applied
BATT2_VOLT_MULT: Used to convert the voltage of the voltage sensing pin (BATT2_VOLT_PIN) to the actual battery's voltage (pin_voltage * VOLT_MULT).
BATT2_VOLT_PIN:
Sets the analog input pin that should be used for voltage monitoring on AD7091R5.

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled
  100: PX4-v1
  13: Pixhawk2_PM2/CubeOrange_PM2
  14: CubeOrange
  16: Durandal
  2: Pixhawk/Pixracer/Navio2/Pixhawk2_PM1
  5: Navigator
BATT3_FL_VLT_MIN:
The voltage seen on the analog pin when the fuel tank is empty. Note: For this type of battery monitor, the voltage seen by the analog pin is displayed as battery voltage on a GCS.

范围: 0.01 … 10
BATT3_FL_V_MULT:
Voltage multiplier to determine what the full tank voltage reading is. This is calculated as 1 / (Voltage_Full - Voltage_Empty) Note: For this type of battery monitor, the voltage seen by the analog pin is displayed as battery voltage on a GCS.

范围: 0.01 … 10
BATT3_FS_CRT_ACT:
What action the vehicle should perform if it hits a critical battery failsafe

取值:
  0: Warn only
  1: Land
  2: RTL
  3: SmartRTL or RTL
  4: SmartRTL or Land
  5: Terminate
  6: Auto DO_LAND_START/DO_RETURN_PATH_START or RTL
  7: Brake or Land
BATT3_FS_LOW_ACT:
What action the vehicle should perform if it hits a low battery failsafe

取值:
  0: Warn only
  1: Land
  2: RTL
  3: SmartRTL or RTL
  4: SmartRTL or Land
  5: Terminate
  6: Auto DO_LAND_START/DO_RETURN_PATH_START or RTL
  7: Brake or Land
BATT3_FS_VOLTSRC:
Voltage type used for detection of low voltage event

取值:
  0: Raw Voltage
  1: Sag Compensated Voltage
BATT3_I2C_ADDR:
Battery monitor I2C address. If this is zero then probe list of supported addresses

范围: 0 … 127
BATT3_I2C_BUS:
Battery monitor I2C bus number

范围: 0 … 3
BATT3_LOW_MAH: Battery capacity at which the low battery failsafe is triggered. Set to 0 to disable battery remaining failsafe. If the battery capacity drops below this level the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATT3_FS_LOW_ACT parameter.
BATT3_LOW_TIMER:
This is the timeout in seconds before a low voltage event will be triggered. For aircraft with low C batteries it may be necessary to raise this in order to cope with low voltage on long takeoffs. A value of zero disables low voltage errors.

范围: 0 … 120
BATT3_LOW_VOLT: Battery voltage that triggers a low battery failsafe. Set to 0 to disable. If the battery voltage drops below this voltage continuously for more then the period specified by the BATT3_LOW_TIMER parameter then the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATT3_FS_LOW_ACT parameter.
BATT3_MAX_AMPS:
This controls the maximum current the INA239 sensor will work with.

范围: 1 … 400
BATT3_MAX_VOLT:
Maximum voltage of battery. Provides scaling of current versus voltage

范围: 7 … 100
BATT3_MONITOR:
Controls enabling monitoring of the battery's voltage and current

取值:
  0: Disabled
  10: Sum Of Selected Monitors
  11: FuelFlow
  12: FuelLevelPWM
  13: SMBUS-SUI3
  14: SMBUS-SUI6
  15: NeoDesign
  16: SMBus-Maxell
  17: Generator-Elec
  18: Generator-Fuel
  19: Rotoye
  20: MPPT
  21: INA2XX (INA226 INA228 INA238 INA231 INA260)
  22: LTC2946
  23: Torqeedo
  24: FuelLevelAnalog
  25: Synthetic Current and Analog Voltage
  26: INA239_SPI
  27: EFI
  28: AD7091R5
  29: Scripting
  3: Analog Voltage Only
  30: INA3221
  31: Analog Current Only
  32: TIBQ76952-I2C (Periph only)
  4: Analog Voltage and Current
  5: Solo
  6: Bebop
  7: SMBus-Generic
  8: DroneCAN-BatteryInfo
  9: ESC
BATT3_OPTIONS:
This sets options to change the behaviour of the battery monitor

位定义:
  位0: Ignore DroneCAN SoC
  位1: MPPT reports input voltage and current
  位2: MPPT Powered off when disarmed
  位3: MPPT Powered on when armed
  位4: MPPT Powered off at boot
  位5: MPPT Powered on at boot
  位6: Send resistance compensated voltage to GCS
  位7: Allow DroneCAN InfoAux to be from a different CAN node
  位8: Battery is for internal autopilot use only
  位9: Sum monitor measures minimum voltage instead of average
  位10: Allow DroneCAN dynamic node update on hot-swap
BATT3_SERIAL_NUM: Battery serial number, automatically filled in for SMBus batteries, otherwise will be -1. With DroneCan it is the battery_id.
BATT3_SHUNT:
This sets the shunt resistor used in the device

范围: 0.0001 … 0.01
BATT3_SUM_MASK:
0: sum of remaining battery monitors, If none 0 sum of specified monitors. Current will be summed and voltages averaged.

位定义:
  位0: monitor 1
  位1: monitor 2
  位2: monitor 3
  位3: monitor 4
  位4: monitor 5
  位5: monitor 6
  位6: monitor 7
  位7: monitor 8
  位8: monitor 9
BATT3_VLT_OFFSET: Voltage offset on voltage pin. This allows for an offset due to a diode. This voltage is subtracted before the scaling is applied
BATT3_VOLT_MULT: Used to convert the voltage of the voltage sensing pin (BATT3_VOLT_PIN) to the actual battery's voltage (pin_voltage * VOLT_MULT).
BATT3_VOLT_PIN:
Sets the analog input pin that should be used for voltage monitoring on AD7091R5.

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled
BATT4_AMP_OFFSET: Voltage offset at zero current on current sensor
BATT4_AMP_PERVLT: Number of amps that a 1V reading on the current sensor corresponds to.
BATT4_ARM_MAH: Battery capacity remaining which is required to arm the aircraft. Set to 0 to allow arming at any capacity. Note that execept for smart batteries rebooting the vehicle will always reset the remaining capacity estimate, which can lead to this check not providing sufficent protection, it is recommended to always use this in conjunction with the BATT4_ARM_VOLT parameter.
BATT4_ARM_VOLT: Battery voltage level which is required to arm the aircraft. Set to 0 to allow arming at any voltage.
BATT4_CAPACITY: Capacity of the battery in mAh when full
BATT4_CHANNEL:
INA3221 channel to return data for

范围: 1 … 3
BATT4_CRT_MAH: Battery capacity at which the critical battery failsafe is triggered. Set to 0 to disable battery remaining failsafe. If the battery capacity drops below this level the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATT4_FS_CRT_ACT parameter.
BATT4_CRT_VOLT: Battery voltage that triggers a critical battery failsafe. Set to 0 to disable. If the battery voltage drops below this voltage continuously for more then the period specified by the BATT4_LOW_TIMER parameter then the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATT4_FS_CRT_ACT parameter.
BATT4_CURR_MULT:
Multiplier applied to all current related reports to allow for adjustment if no UAVCAN param access or current splitting applications

范围: 0.1 … 10
BATT4_CURR_PIN:
Sets the analog input pin that should be used for Current monitoring on AD7091R5.

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled
BATT4_ESC_INDEX:
ESC Telemetry Index to write voltage, current, consumption and temperature data to. Use 0 to disable.

范围: 0 … 10
BATT4_ESC_MASK:
If 0 all connected ESCs will be used. If non-zero, only those selected in will be used.

位定义:
  位0: ESC 1
  位1: ESC 2
  位2: ESC 3
  位3: ESC 4
  位4: ESC 5
  位5: ESC 6
  位6: ESC 7
  位7: ESC 8

  位29: ESC 30
  位30: ESC 31
  位31: ESC 32
BATT4_FL_FF:
First order polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10
BATT4_FL_FLTR:
Filter frequency in Hertz where a low pass filter is used. This is used to filter out tank slosh from the fuel level reading. A value of -1 disables the filter and unfiltered voltage is used to determine the fuel level. The suggested values at in the range of 0.2 Hz to 0.5 Hz.

范围: -1 … 1
BATT4_FL_FS:
Second order polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10
BATT4_FL_FT:
Third order polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10
BATT4_FL_OFF:
Offset polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10

BATT6_FL_FF:
First order polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10
BATT6_FL_FLTR:
Filter frequency in Hertz where a low pass filter is used. This is used to filter out tank slosh from the fuel level reading. A value of -1 disables the filter and unfiltered voltage is used to determine the fuel level. The suggested values at in the range of 0.2 Hz to 0.5 Hz.

范围: -1 … 1
BATT6_FL_FS:
Second order polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10
BATT6_FL_FT:
Third order polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10
BATT6_FL_OFF:
Offset polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10
BATT6_FL_PIN:
Analog input pin that fuel level sensor is connected to.Analog Airspeed or RSSI ports can be used for Analog input( some autopilots provide others also). Values for some autopilots are given as examples. Search wiki for "Analog pins".

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled
  100: PX4-v1
  13: Pixhawk2_PM2/CubeOrange_PM2
  14: CubeOrange
  16: Durandal
  2: Pixhawk/Pixracer/Navio2/Pixhawk2_PM1
  5: Navigator
BATT6_FL_VLT_MIN:
The voltage seen on the analog pin when the fuel tank is empty. Note: For this type of battery monitor, the voltage seen by the analog pin is displayed as battery voltage on a GCS.

范围: 0.01 … 10
BATT6_FL_V_MULT:
Voltage multiplier to determine what the full tank voltage reading is. This is calculated as 1 / (Voltage_Full - Voltage_Empty) Note: For this type of battery monitor, the voltage seen by the analog pin is displayed as battery voltage on a GCS.

范围: 0.01 … 10
BATT6_FS_CRT_ACT:
What action the vehicle should perform if it hits a critical battery failsafe

取值:
  0: Warn only
  1: Land
  2: RTL
  3: SmartRTL or RTL
  4: SmartRTL or Land
  5: Terminate
  6: Auto DO_LAND_START/DO_RETURN_PATH_START or RTL
  7: Brake or Land
BATT6_FS_LOW_ACT:
What action the vehicle should perform if it hits a low battery failsafe

取值:
  0: Warn only
  1: Land
  2: RTL
  3: SmartRTL or RTL
  4: SmartRTL or Land
  5: Terminate
  6: Auto DO_LAND_START/DO_RETURN_PATH_START or RTL
  7: Brake or Land
BATT6_FS_VOLTSRC:
Voltage type used for detection of low voltage event

取值:
  0: Raw Voltage
  1: Sag Compensated Voltage
BATT6_I2C_ADDR:
Battery monitor I2C address. If this is zero then probe list of supported addresses

范围: 0 … 127
BATT6_I2C_BUS:
Battery monitor I2C bus number

范围: 0 … 3
BATT6_LOW_MAH: Battery capacity at which the low battery failsafe is triggered. Set to 0 to disable battery remaining failsafe. If the battery capacity drops below this level the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATT6_FS_LOW_ACT parameter.
BATT6_LOW_TIMER:
This is the timeout in seconds before a low voltage event will be triggered. For aircraft with low C batteries it may be necessary to raise this in order to cope with low voltage on long takeoffs. A value of zero disables low voltage errors.

范围: 0 … 120
BATT6_LOW_VOLT: Battery voltage that triggers a low battery failsafe. Set to 0 to disable. If the battery voltage drops below this voltage continuously for more then the period specified by the BATT6_LOW_TIMER parameter then the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATT6_FS_LOW_ACT parameter.
BATT6_MAX_AMPS:
This controls the maximum current the INA239 sensor will work with.

范围: 1 … 400
BATT6_MAX_VOLT:
Maximum voltage of battery. Provides scaling of current versus voltage

范围: 7 … 100
BATT6_MONITOR:
Controls enabling monitoring of the battery's voltage and current

取值:
  0: Disabled
  10: Sum Of Selected Monitors
  11: FuelFlow
  12: FuelLevelPWM
  13: SMBUS-SUI3
  14: SMBUS-SUI6
  15: NeoDesign
  16: SMBus-Maxell
  17: Generator-Elec
  18: Generator-Fuel
  19: Rotoye
  20: MPPT
  21: INA2XX (INA226 INA228 INA238 INA231 INA260)
  22: LTC2946
  23: Torqeedo
  24: FuelLevelAnalog
  25: Synthetic Current and Analog Voltage
  26: INA239_SPI
  27: EFI
  28: AD7091R5
  29: Scripting
  3: Analog Voltage Only
  30: INA3221
  31: Analog Current Only
  32: TIBQ76952-I2C (Periph only)
  4: Analog Voltage and Current
  5: Solo
  6: Bebop
  7: SMBus-Generic
  8: DroneCAN-BatteryInfo
  9: ESC
BATT6_OPTIONS:
This sets options to change the behaviour of the battery monitor

位定义:
  位0: Ignore DroneCAN SoC
  位1: MPPT reports input voltage and current
  位2: MPPT Powered off when disarmed
  位3: MPPT Powered on when armed
  位4: MPPT Powered off at boot
  位5: MPPT Powered on at boot
  位6: Send resistance compensated voltage to GCS
  位7: Allow DroneCAN InfoAux to be from a different CAN node
  位8: Battery is for internal autopilot use only
  位9: Sum monitor measures minimum voltage instead of average
  位10: Allow DroneCAN dynamic node update on hot-swap
BATT6_SERIAL_NUM: Battery serial number, automatically filled in for SMBus batteries, otherwise will be -1. With DroneCan it is the battery_id.
BATT6_SHUNT:
This sets the shunt resistor used in the device

范围: 0.0001 … 0.01
BATT6_SUM_MASK:
0: sum of remaining battery monitors, If none 0 sum of specified monitors. Current will be summed and voltages averaged.

位定义:
  位0: monitor 1
  位1: monitor 2
  位2: monitor 3
  位3: monitor 4
  位4: monitor 5
  位5: monitor 6
  位6: monitor 7
  位7: monitor 8
  位8: monitor 9
BATT6_VLT_OFFSET: Voltage offset on voltage pin. This allows for an offset due to a diode. This voltage is subtracted before the scaling is applied
BATT6_VOLT_MULT: Used to convert the voltage of the voltage sensing pin (BATT6_VOLT_PIN) to the actual battery's voltage (pin_voltage * VOLT_MULT).
BATT6_VOLT_PIN:
Sets the analog input pin that should be used for voltage monitoring on AD7091R5.

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled
BATT7_AMP_OFFSET: Voltage offset at zero current on current sensor
BATT7_AMP_PERVLT: Number of amps that a 1V reading on the current sensor corresponds to.
BATT7_ARM_MAH: Battery capacity remaining which is required to arm the aircraft. Set to 0 to allow arming at any capacity. Note that execept for smart batteries rebooting the vehicle will always reset the remaining capacity estimate, which can lead to this check not providing sufficent protection, it is recommended to always use this in conjunction with the BATT7_ARM_VOLT parameter.
BATT7_ARM_VOLT: Battery voltage level which is required to arm the aircraft. Set to 0 to allow arming at any voltage.
BATT7_CAPACITY: Capacity of the battery in mAh when full
BATT7_CHANNEL:
INA3221 channel to return data for

范围: 1 … 3
BATT7_CRT_MAH: Battery capacity at which the critical battery failsafe is triggered. Set to 0 to disable battery remaining failsafe. If the battery capacity drops below this level the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATT7_FS_CRT_ACT parameter.
BATT7_CRT_VOLT: Battery voltage that triggers a critical battery failsafe. Set to 0 to disable. If the battery voltage drops below this voltage continuously for more then the period specified by the BATT7_LOW_TIMER parameter then the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATT7_FS_CRT_ACT parameter.
BATT7_CURR_MULT:
Multiplier applied to all current related reports to allow for adjustment if no UAVCAN param access or current splitting applications

范围: 0.1 … 10
BATT7_CURR_PIN:
Sets the analog input pin that should be used for Current monitoring on AD7091R5.

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled
BATT7_ESC_INDEX:
ESC Telemetry Index to write voltage, current, consumption and temperature data to. Use 0 to disable.

范围: 0 … 10

If the battery voltage drops below this voltage continuously for more then the period specified by the BATT9_LOW_TIMER parameter then the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATT9_FS_CRT_ACT parameter.
BATT9_CURR_MULT:
Multiplier applied to all current related reports to allow for adjustment if no UAVCAN param access or current splitting applications

范围: 0.1 … 10
BATT9_CURR_PIN:
Sets the analog input pin that should be used for Current monitoring on AD7091R5.

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled
BATT9_ESC_INDEX:
ESC Telemetry Index to write voltage, current, consumption and temperature data to. Use 0 to disable.

范围: 0 … 10
BATT9_ESC_MASK:
If 0 all connected ESCs will be used. If non-zero, only those selected in will be used.

  位0: ESC 1
  位1: ESC 2

BATT9_FL_FF:
First order polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10
BATT9_FL_FLTR:
Filter frequency in Hertz where a low pass filter is used. This is used to filter out tank slosh from the fuel level reading. A value of -1 disables the filter and unfiltered voltage is used to determine the fuel level. The suggested values at in the range of 0.2 Hz to 0.5 Hz.

范围: -1 … 1
BATT9_FL_FS:
Second order polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10
BATT9_FL_FT:
Third order polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10
BATT9_FL_OFF:
Offset polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10
BATT9_FL_PIN:
Analog input pin that fuel level sensor is connected to.Analog Airspeed or RSSI ports can be used for Analog input( some autopilots provide others also). Values for some autopilots are given as examples. Search wiki for "Analog pins".

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled
  100: PX4-v1
  13: Pixhawk2_PM2/CubeOrange_PM2
  14: CubeOrange
  16: Durandal
  2: Pixhawk/Pixracer/Navio2/Pixhawk2_PM1
  5: Navigator
BATT9_FL_VLT_MIN:
The voltage seen on the analog pin when the fuel tank is empty. Note: For this type of battery monitor, the voltage seen by the analog pin is displayed as battery voltage on a GCS.

范围: 0.01 … 10
BATT9_FL_V_MULT:
Voltage multiplier to determine what the full tank voltage reading is. This is calculated as 1 / (Voltage_Full - Voltage_Empty) Note: For this type of battery monitor, the voltage seen by the analog pin is displayed as battery voltage on a GCS.

范围: 0.01 … 10
BATT9_FS_CRT_ACT:
What action the vehicle should perform if it hits a critical battery failsafe

取值:
  0: Warn only
  1: Land
  2: RTL
  3: SmartRTL or RTL
  4: SmartRTL or Land
  5: Terminate
  6: Auto DO_LAND_START/DO_RETURN_PATH_START or RTL
  7: Brake or Land
BATT9_FS_LOW_ACT:
What action the vehicle should perform if it hits a low battery failsafe

取值:
  0: Warn only
  1: Land
  2: RTL
  3: SmartRTL or RTL
  4: SmartRTL or Land
  5: Terminate
  6: Auto DO_LAND_START/DO_RETURN_PATH_START or RTL
  7: Brake or Land
BATT9_FS_VOLTSRC:
Voltage type used for detection of low voltage event

取值:
  0: Raw Voltage
  1: Sag Compensated Voltage
BATT9_I2C_ADDR:
Battery monitor I2C address. If this is zero then probe list of supported addresses

范围: 0 … 127
BATT9_I2C_BUS:
Battery monitor I2C bus number

范围: 0 … 3
BATT9_LOW_MAH: Battery capacity at which the low battery failsafe is triggered. Set to 0 to disable battery remaining failsafe. If the battery capacity drops below this level the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATT9_FS_LOW_ACT parameter.
BATT9_LOW_TIMER:
This is the timeout in seconds before a low voltage event will be triggered. For aircraft with low C batteries it may be necessary to raise this in order to cope with low voltage on long takeoffs. A value of zero disables low voltage errors.

范围: 0 … 120
BATT9_LOW_VOLT: Battery voltage that triggers a low battery failsafe. Set to 0 to disable. If the battery voltage drops below this voltage continuously for more then the period specified by the BATT9_LOW_TIMER parameter then the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATT9_FS_LOW_ACT parameter.
BATT9_MAX_AMPS:
This controls the maximum current the INA239 sensor will work with.

范围: 1 … 400
BATT9_MAX_VOLT:
Maximum voltage of battery. Provides scaling of current versus voltage

范围: 7 … 100
BATT9_MONITOR:
Controls enabling monitoring of the battery's voltage and current

取值:
  0: Disabled
  10: Sum Of Selected Monitors
  11: FuelFlow
  12: FuelLevelPWM
  13: SMBUS-SUI3
  14: SMBUS-SUI6
  15: NeoDesign
  16: SMBus-Maxell
  17: Generator-Elec
  18: Generator-Fuel
  19: Rotoye
  20: MPPT

  22: LTC2946
  23: Torqeedo
  24: FuelLevelAnalog
  25: Synthetic Current and Analog Voltage
  26: INA239_SPI
  27: EFI
  28: AD7091R5
  29: Scripting
  3: Analog Voltage Only
  30: INA3221
  31: Analog Current Only
  32: TIBQ76952-I2C (Periph only)
  4: Analog Voltage and Current
  5: Solo
  6: Bebop
  7: SMBus-Generic
  8: DroneCAN-BatteryInfo
  9: ESC
BATT9_OPTIONS:
This sets options to change the behaviour of the battery monitor

位定义:
  位0: Ignore DroneCAN SoC
  位1: MPPT reports input voltage and current
  位2: MPPT Powered off when disarmed
  位3: MPPT Powered on when armed
  位4: MPPT Powered off at boot
  位5: MPPT Powered on at boot
  位6: Send resistance compensated voltage to GCS
  位7: Allow DroneCAN InfoAux to be from a different CAN node
  位8: Battery is for internal autopilot use only
  位9: Sum monitor measures minimum voltage instead of average
  位10: Allow DroneCAN dynamic node update on hot-swap
BATT9_SERIAL_NUM: Battery serial number, automatically filled in for SMBus batteries, otherwise will be -1. With DroneCan it is the battery_id.
BATT9_SHUNT:
This sets the shunt resistor used in the device

范围: 0.0001 … 0.01
BATT9_SUM_MASK:
0: sum of remaining battery monitors, If none 0 sum of specified monitors. Current will be summed and voltages averaged.

位定义:
  位0: monitor 1
  位1: monitor 2
  位2: monitor 3
  位3: monitor 4
  位4: monitor 5
  位5: monitor 6
  位6: monitor 7
  位7: monitor 8
  位8: monitor 9
BATT9_VLT_OFFSET: Voltage offset on voltage pin. This allows for an offset due to a diode. This voltage is subtracted before the scaling is applied
BATT9_VOLT_MULT: Used to convert the voltage of the voltage sensing pin (BATT9_VOLT_PIN) to the actual battery's voltage (pin_voltage * VOLT_MULT).
BATT9_VOLT_PIN:
Sets the analog input pin that should be used for voltage monitoring on AD7091R5.

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled
BATTA_AMP_OFFSET: Voltage offset at zero current on current sensor
BATTA_AMP_PERVLT: Number of amps that a 1V reading on the current sensor corresponds to.
BATTA_ARM_MAH: Battery capacity remaining which is required to arm the aircraft. Set to 0 to allow arming at any capacity. Note that execept for smart batteries rebooting the vehicle will always reset the remaining capacity estimate, which can lead to this check not providing sufficent protection, it is recommended to always use this in conjunction with the BATTA_ARM_VOLT parameter.
BATTA_ARM_VOLT: Battery voltage level which is required to arm the aircraft. Set to 0 to allow arming at any voltage.
BATTA_CAPACITY: Capacity of the battery in mAh when full
BATTA_CHANNEL:
INA3221 channel to return data for

范围: 1 … 3

If the battery voltage drops below this voltage continuously for more then the period specified by the BATTA_LOW_TIMER parameter then the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATTA_FS_CRT_ACT parameter.

BATTB_VOLT_MULT: Used to convert the voltage of the voltage sensing pin (BATTB_VOLT_PIN) to the actual battery's voltage (pin_voltage * VOLT_MULT).
BATTB_VOLT_PIN:
Sets the analog input pin that should be used for voltage monitoring on AD7091R5.

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled
BATTC_AMP_OFFSET: Voltage offset at zero current on current sensor
BATTC_AMP_PERVLT: Number of amps that a 1V reading on the current sensor corresponds to.
BATTC_ARM_MAH: Battery capacity remaining which is required to arm the aircraft. Set to 0 to allow arming at any capacity. Note that execept for smart batteries rebooting the vehicle will always reset the remaining capacity estimate, which can lead to this check not providing sufficent protection, it is recommended to always use this in conjunction with the BATTC_ARM_VOLT parameter.
BATTC_ARM_VOLT: Battery voltage level which is required to arm the aircraft. Set to 0 to allow arming at any voltage.
BATTC_CAPACITY: Capacity of the battery in mAh when full
BATTC_CHANNEL:
INA3221 channel to return data for

范围: 1 … 3
BATTC_CRT_MAH: Battery capacity at which the critical battery failsafe is triggered. Set to 0 to disable battery remaining failsafe. If the battery capacity drops below this level the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATTC_FS_CRT_ACT parameter.
BATTC_CRT_VOLT: Battery voltage that triggers a critical battery failsafe. Set to 0 to disable. If the battery voltage drops below this voltage continuously for more then the period specified by the BATTC_LOW_TIMER parameter then the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATTC_FS_CRT_ACT parameter.
BATTC_CURR_MULT:
Multiplier applied to all current related reports to allow for adjustment if no UAVCAN param access or current splitting applications

范围: 0.1 … 10
BATTC_CURR_PIN:
Sets the analog input pin that should be used for Current monitoring on AD7091R5.

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled
BATTC_ESC_INDEX:
ESC Telemetry Index to write voltage, current, consumption and temperature data to. Use 0 to disable.

范围: 0 … 10

If 0 all connected ESCs will be used. If non-zero, only those selected in will be used.

BATTC_FL_FF:
First order polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10
BATTC_FL_FLTR:
Filter frequency in Hertz where a low pass filter is used. This is used to filter out tank slosh from the fuel level reading. A value of -1 disables the filter and unfiltered voltage is used to determine the fuel level. The suggested values at in the range of 0.2 Hz to 0.5 Hz.

范围: -1 … 1
BATTC_FL_FS:
Second order polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10
BATTC_FL_FT:
Third order polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10
BATTC_FL_OFF:
Offset polynomial fit term

范围: -10 … 10
BATTC_FL_PIN:
Analog input pin that fuel level sensor is connected to.Analog Airspeed or RSSI ports can be used for Analog input( some autopilots provide others also). Values for some autopilots are given as examples. Search wiki for "Analog pins".

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled
  100: PX4-v1
  13: Pixhawk2_PM2/CubeOrange_PM2
  14: CubeOrange
  16: Durandal
  2: Pixhawk/Pixracer/Navio2/Pixhawk2_PM1
  5: Navigator
BATTC_FL_VLT_MIN:
The voltage seen on the analog pin when the fuel tank is empty. Note: For this type of battery monitor, the voltage seen by the analog pin is displayed as battery voltage on a GCS.

范围: 0.01 … 10
BATTC_FL_V_MULT:
Voltage multiplier to determine what the full tank voltage reading is. This is calculated as 1 / (Voltage_Full - Voltage_Empty) Note: For this type of battery monitor, the voltage seen by the analog pin is displayed as battery voltage on a GCS.

范围: 0.01 … 10
BATTC_FS_CRT_ACT:
What action the vehicle should perform if it hits a critical battery failsafe

取值:
  0: Warn only
  1: Land
  2: RTL
  3: SmartRTL or RTL
  4: SmartRTL or Land
  5: Terminate
  6: Auto DO_LAND_START/DO_RETURN_PATH_START or RTL
  7: Brake or Land
BATTC_FS_LOW_ACT:
What action the vehicle should perform if it hits a low battery failsafe

取值:
  0: Warn only
  1: Land
  2: RTL
  3: SmartRTL or RTL
  4: SmartRTL or Land
  5: Terminate
  6: Auto DO_LAND_START/DO_RETURN_PATH_START or RTL
  7: Brake or Land
BATTC_FS_VOLTSRC:
Voltage type used for detection of low voltage event

取值:
  0: Raw Voltage
  1: Sag Compensated Voltage
BATTC_I2C_ADDR:
Battery monitor I2C address. If this is zero then probe list of supported addresses

范围: 0 … 127
BATTC_I2C_BUS:
Battery monitor I2C bus number

范围: 0 … 3
BATTC_LOW_MAH: Battery capacity at which the low battery failsafe is triggered. Set to 0 to disable battery remaining failsafe. If the battery capacity drops below this level the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATTC_FS_LOW_ACT parameter.
BATTC_LOW_TIMER:
This is the timeout in seconds before a low voltage event will be triggered. For aircraft with low C batteries it may be necessary to raise this in order to cope with low voltage on long takeoffs. A value of zero disables low voltage errors.

范围: 0 … 120
BATTC_LOW_VOLT: Battery voltage that triggers a low battery failsafe. Set to 0 to disable. If the battery voltage drops below this voltage continuously for more then the period specified by the BATTC_LOW_TIMER parameter then the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATTC_FS_LOW_ACT parameter.
BATTC_MAX_AMPS:
This controls the maximum current the INA239 sensor will work with.

范围: 1 … 400
BATTC_MAX_VOLT:
Maximum voltage of battery. Provides scaling of current versus voltage

范围: 7 … 100
BATTC_MONITOR:
Controls enabling monitoring of the battery's voltage and current

取值:
  0: Disabled
  10: Sum Of Selected Monitors
  11: FuelFlow
  12: FuelLevelPWM
  13: SMBUS-SUI3
  14: SMBUS-SUI6
  15: NeoDesign
  16: SMBus-Maxell
  17: Generator-Elec
  18: Generator-Fuel
  19: Rotoye
  20: MPPT
  21: INA2XX (INA226 INA228 INA238 INA231 INA260)
  22: LTC2946
  23: Torqeedo
  24: FuelLevelAnalog
  25: Synthetic Current and Analog Voltage
  26: INA239_SPI
  27: EFI
  28: AD7091R5
  29: Scripting
  3: Analog Voltage Only
  30: INA3221
  31: Analog Current Only
  32: TIBQ76952-I2C (Periph only)
  4: Analog Voltage and Current
  5: Solo
  6: Bebop
  7: SMBus-Generic
  8: DroneCAN-BatteryInfo
  9: ESC
BATTC_OPTIONS:
This sets options to change the behaviour of the battery monitor

位定义:
  位0: Ignore DroneCAN SoC
  位1: MPPT reports input voltage and current
  位2: MPPT Powered off when disarmed
  位3: MPPT Powered on when armed
  位4: MPPT Powered off at boot
  位5: MPPT Powered on at boot
  位6: Send resistance compensated voltage to GCS
  位7: Allow DroneCAN InfoAux to be from a different CAN node
  位8: Battery is for internal autopilot use only
  位9: Sum monitor measures minimum voltage instead of average
  位10: Allow DroneCAN dynamic node update on hot-swap
BATTC_SERIAL_NUM: Battery serial number, automatically filled in for SMBus batteries, otherwise will be -1. With DroneCan it is the battery_id.
BATTC_SHUNT:
This sets the shunt resistor used in the device

范围: 0.0001 … 0.01

  位3: monitor 4
  位4: monitor 5
  位5: monitor 6
  位6: monitor 7

  位2: MPPT Powered off when disarmed
  位3: MPPT Powered on when armed
  位4: MPPT Powered off at boot
  位5: MPPT Powered on at boot
  位6: Send resistance compensated voltage to GCS
  位7: Allow DroneCAN InfoAux to be from a different CAN node
  位8: Battery is for internal autopilot use only
  位9: Sum monitor measures minimum voltage instead of average
  位10: Allow DroneCAN dynamic node update on hot-swap
BATTE_SERIAL_NUM: Battery serial number, automatically filled in for SMBus batteries, otherwise will be -1. With DroneCan it is the battery_id.
BATTE_SHUNT:
This sets the shunt resistor used in the device

范围: 0.0001 … 0.01
BATTE_SUM_MASK:
0: sum of remaining battery monitors, If none 0 sum of specified monitors. Current will be summed and voltages averaged.

位定义:
  位0: monitor 1
  位1: monitor 2
  位2: monitor 3
  位3: monitor 4
  位4: monitor 5
  位5: monitor 6
  位6: monitor 7
  位7: monitor 8
  位8: monitor 9
BATTE_VLT_OFFSET: Voltage offset on voltage pin. This allows for an offset due to a diode. This voltage is subtracted before the scaling is applied
BATTE_VOLT_MULT: Used to convert the voltage of the voltage sensing pin (BATTE_VOLT_PIN) to the actual battery's voltage (pin_voltage * VOLT_MULT).
BATTE_VOLT_PIN:
Sets the analog input pin that should be used for voltage monitoring on AD7091R5.

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled
BATTF_AMP_OFFSET: Voltage offset at zero current on current sensor
BATTF_AMP_PERVLT: Number of amps that a 1V reading on the current sensor corresponds to.
BATTF_ARM_MAH: Battery capacity remaining which is required to arm the aircraft. Set to 0 to allow arming at any capacity. Note that execept for smart batteries rebooting the vehicle will always reset the remaining capacity estimate, which can lead to this check not providing sufficent protection, it is recommended to always use this in conjunction with the BATTF_ARM_VOLT parameter.
BATTF_ARM_VOLT: Battery voltage level which is required to arm the aircraft. Set to 0 to allow arming at any voltage.
BATTF_CAPACITY: Capacity of the battery in mAh when full
BATTF_CHANNEL:
INA3221 channel to return data for

范围: 1 … 3
BATTF_CRT_MAH: Battery capacity at which the critical battery failsafe is triggered. Set to 0 to disable battery remaining failsafe. If the battery capacity drops below this level the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATTF_FS_CRT_ACT parameter.
BATTF_CRT_VOLT: Battery voltage that triggers a critical battery failsafe. Set to 0 to disable. If the battery voltage drops below this voltage continuously for more then the period specified by the BATTF_LOW_TIMER parameter then the vehicle will perform the failsafe specified by the BATTF_FS_CRT_ACT parameter.
BATTF_CURR_MULT:
Multiplier applied to all current related reports to allow for adjustment if no UAVCAN param access or current splitting applications

范围: 0.1 … 10
BATTF_CURR_PIN:
Sets the analog input pin that should be used for Current monitoring on AD7091R5.

范围: -1 … 127
取值:
  -1: Disabled
BATTF_ESC_INDEX:
ESC Telemetry Index to write voltage, current, consumption and temperature data to. Use 0 to disable.

范围: 0 … 10
BATTF_ESC_MASK:
If 0 all connected ESCs will be used. If non-zero, only those selected in will be used.

位定义:
  位0: ESC 1
  位1: ESC 2
  位2: ESC 3
  位3: ESC 4
  位4: ESC 5
  位5: ESC 6
  位6: ESC 7
  位7: ESC 8
  位8: ESC 9
  位9: ESC 10
  位10: ESC 11

  位12: ESC 13

  位18: ESC 19
  位19: ESC 20
